debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
inst✝³ : LinearOrder ι
E : Type u_4
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : InfSet ι
inst✝ : Bot ι
X : ι → Ω → E
t : ι
K : ℝ
ω : Ω
⊢ ⨆ s, ⨆ (_ : s ≤ t), ‖stoppedProcess X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) s ω‖ ≤
    K +
      {ω | hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ ↑t}.indicator
        (fun ω => ‖stoppedValue X (hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥) ω‖) ω

failed_attempts:
by
  refine ciSup_le fun s => ?_
  by_cases hs : s ≤ t <;>
    simp_all +decide [stoppedProcess_eq_of_ge]
  · by_cases h : hittingAfter (fun t ω => ‖X t ω‖) (Set.Ici K) ⊥ ω ≤ s <;>
      simp_all +decide [stoppedProcess_eq_of_ge]
    · refine le_add_of_nonneg_of_le hK ?_
      rw [Set.indicator_of_mem] <;> simp_all +decide [stoppedValue]
      exact le_trans h (WithTop.coe_le_coe.mpr hs)
    · rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le]
      · exact le_add_of_le_of_nonneg (le_of_lt (norm_lt_K_of_lt_hittingAfter h))
          (by rw [Set.indicator_apply]; aesop)
      · exact le_of_lt h
  · exact add_nonneg hK (by rw [Set.indicator_apply]; aesop)
